title: Invoice PDF template catalogue
description: The 4 template families shipped day-1. Each declares its use case, entitlement requirement, and the field layout summary. Templates are Blade views under resources/views/invoice/pdf/{slug}.blade.php. The InvoicePDFRenderer picks the template based on tenant entitlement + settings.invoice.pdf_template.

templates.description: The default template for Small-tier tenants (no branding entitlement). Simple, clean, Stackra-branded footer with 'Powered by Academorix' + tenant name in header + billing_address in top-left + invoice details in top-right + line-item table + totals summary at bottom.

layout_summary.tenant_block: Tenant name + address (from tenant.branding.address if set)
layout_summary.line_items_table: line_number, description, quantity, unit_price, total (+ tax breakdown when applicable)
layout_summary.totals_summary: Subtotal + Discount + Tax + Total + Amount Paid + Amount Due

templates.description: For Medium+ tenants with invoice_tenant_branded_pdf entitlement. Replaces Academorix branding with tenant logo + colors + footer. All other layout mirrors stackra-default.

layout_summary.header: Tenant logo (from tenant.branding.logo_url) + tenant primary color band
layout_summary.tenant_block: Tenant name + address + phone + email (from tenant.branding)
layout_summary.line_items_table: Same as default + tenant secondary color for header row
layout_summary.totals_summary: Same as default + tenant primary color for total row

templates.description: Compact single-page layout. No frills. Suitable for tenants with high-volume invoicing where each PDF must fit on one page even with many line items. Enterprise recommended.

layout_summary.header: Small tenant name + invoice number in single line
layout_summary.tenant_block: Compact: name + email + address on one line
layout_summary.billing_address_block: Compact: bill-to name + address in 2 lines
layout_summary.totals_summary: Right-aligned totals block, no separate tax breakdown

templates.description: EU VAT Directive Art. 226-compliant layout. Includes all mandatory fields in the required order. For tenants operating in EU VAT jurisdictions.

layout_summary.header: Tenant name + tenant VAT number (mandatory per Art. 226(3))
layout_summary.tenant_block: Full name + address + VAT number + fiscal representative (if applicable)
layout_summary.billing_address_block: Full customer name + address + customer VAT number (mandatory for B2B per Art. 226(4))
layout_summary.line_items_table: Description + quantity + unit_price + tax_rate (per line, mandatory per Art. 226(9)) + tax_amount + line_total
layout_summary.totals_summary: Subtotal + Tax breakdown by rate (mandatory per Art. 226(9)) + Total
layout_summary.footer: 'Reverse charge' notice when applicable (Art. 226(11) — for cross-border B2B) + reference to the underlying supply if this is a corrective invoice (Art. 226(2)a)

templates.notes: Compliance-sensitive template. Tenant admin must verify their tenant VAT number is registered in tenant.branding.tax_id before switching to this template.

notes: Templates are Blade views resolved via `resources/views/invoice/pdf/{slug}.blade.php` (shipped in this module's `resources/views` folder).
Custom templates: Enterprise tenants may register their own via `#[AsInvoicePdfRenderer(supports_templates: ['tenant-custom-{slug}'])]` — the discovery loader picks up new templates at boot.
Every template renders WITHIN the same InvoicePDFRenderer contract — the caller shouldn't know which template was chosen; the rendering pipeline is transparent.
The VAT-EU template is recommended for any tenant operating in an EU member state — even non-VAT-registered ones benefit from the Art. 226-compliant field ordering.
